Assistant Professor
Information Systems Technology and Design Pillar
Singapore University of Technology and Design

About
Publications
MEVER Lab
Openings

Openings (update in May 2026)

  • PhDs: Multiple positions (SUTD-funded) available for Spring 2027 intake. The application deadline is September 2026.
    • SUTD-Funded: You can apply to SUTD's PhD program and list me as a potential advisor. You will be supported by SUTD scholarship.
  • Visiting Research Students / Research Interns: 2-3 positions available. Open to PhD students.
    • Self-Funded/CSC-Funded:The commitment duration should be at least six months.
    • SUTD-CSC: This is under a specific CSC–SUTD scheme. The commitment duration should be at least six months.
    • SUTD Undergraduates: Please consider involve from IROP programme or email me.
  • Research Assistants/Engineers: I am actively hiring one RA currently. I do not have RE positions available at this time.

Application

If you are interested in any of the positions listed above, please email me the following materials:
  • Email subject: Position-Start Time-Name-Affiliation (e.g., "PhD-Fall 2026-Rui Cao-SMU")
  • Curriculum Vitae (CV)
  • Additional supporting information that you believe would be helpful for evaluating your application, such as your research interests, prior research experience, transcripts, future plans, or a brief research proposal
Shortlisted candidates will be contacted within two weeks.

Last updated: July 2026
